In Pve there’s a problem… more so with team Pve if you are trying to heal more than 1 teammate it takes way to long and just yields to them dying so a medic can res and they just get full hp.

People blame medics being immortal not due to the healing but by how it’s possible to get over 150% damage reduction on medic which can be active at all times 

If anything there should be a way for medics to heal multiple teammates more and while keeping the self health as it is
Healing is not too much. People are confusing healing with damage reduction. Same with blitz, it's not the OS, it's the damage reduction that's the issue.

I don't see much of an issue with currently healing strength for PvE and PvP. 

What could use some balance, like I mentioned elsewhere is the res immunity in pvp for players. They should be able to take damage once they aggress anything, if the player shoots or uses a skill they should be able to take damage from other players. As it is it is easy to abuse the res mechanics as a medic to get about 30 seconds of free damage against other players while you can not be touched.
Its ok for now
Maybe in PvP, but for PvE I personally find it ok now
the cooldown should be higher if the skill was destroyed.
On DZ, that's annoying to have in mission runs
The auto trauma support station is overtuned, and that’s coming from a combat medic lol. There should probably be a Rez cooldown once used.
Do you believe Healing is too strong? Explain in which scenarios you have observed this and how you would change it.
